docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-02-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO SEP-03-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ALLAN STEVO IS PRESENT VIA (UNAUTHORIZED) ZOOM APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT KIMBERLY LIBMAN IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. PLAINTIFF GIVEN INSTRUCTIONS FOR AN AUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE. PLAINTIFF WILL SENT A COPY OF HIS EXHIBITS TO THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO THE NEXT COURT HEARING, EVEN IF APPEARING IN PERSON. DEFENDANT MAY APPEAR BY ZOOM AT THE NEXT HEARING WITHOUT FILING A REQUEST. FILING WAIVES SERVICE ISSUES. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING, HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG PRESENTED DISCLOSURE, AND LITIGATE(S)DID NOT OBJECT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
EXHIBITS (DEFENDANT) FOR ZOOM HEARING - RECEIVED {HEARING: OCT-13-2021 AT 8:30AM} AS TO DEFENDANT LIBMAN, KIMBERLY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-12-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-12-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF ALLEN STEVO IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT KIMBERLY LIBMAN IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. SERVICE IS WAIVED AT PREVIOUS HEARING. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY STEVO, ALLAN AS TO DEFENDANT LIBMAN, KIMBERLY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-02-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT LIBMAN, KIMBERLY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-03-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO OCT-13-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ALLAN STEVO IS PRESENT TELEPHONIC/ZOOM. DEFENDANT KIBERLY LIBMAN IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. FINAL CONTINUANCE FOR ZOOM APPEARANCE. PLAINTIFF IS ASKED TO APPEAR BY ZOOM VIDEO (NOT BY ZOOM TELEPHONIC) AND SEND HIS EXHIBITS TO THE COURT (WITH COURT DATE ON EXTERIOR OF PACKAGE) AND DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT IS ASKED TO SEND HER EXHIBITS WITHOUT A SIGNITURE REQUIRED FOR DELIVERY. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST, TO ALLOW HIM TO SUBMITT AN AUTHORIZED ZOOM REQUEST TIMELY.(SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER TO CONTINUE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT LIBMAN, KIMBERLY
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-12-2022 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: EXHIBITS RECD BY MAIL SUBMITTED BY DEFENDANT
ORDER CASE CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-13-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-12-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ALLAN STEVO IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT KIMBERLY LIBMAN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. PLAINTIFF ALLOWED A CONTINUANCE TO AMEND CLAIM AND TO SERVE DEFENDANT ON THE AMENDED CLAIM. ZOOM APPEARANCES ARE ALLOWED FOR THE JAN HEARING DATE. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STEVO, ALLAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LIBMAN, KIMBERLY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
